allow: Bash(node -e "const chunks=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const text=Buffer.concat\(chunks\).toString\(\).replace\(/\\x1b\\[[0-9;]*m/g,''\); const lines=text.split\('\\n'\).filter\(l=>l.includes\('FAILED'\)\); console.log\(lines.join\('\\n'\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const chunks=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const text=Buffer.concat\(chunks\).toString\(\).replace\(/\\x1b\\[[0-9;]*m/g,''\); const lines=text.split\('\\n'\).filter\(l=>l.match\(/FAILED|TOTAL|ERROR/\)\); console.log\(lines.join\('\\n'\)\); }\)")
